## What does this change?

<!-- Briefly describe the change and the motivation behind it. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated under `tests/Servicefy.Tests` covering the new/changed behavior
- [ ] `docs/` updated for any user-facing change (attributes, conventions, decorators, diagnostics)
- [ ] New diagnostics use the next free `SVCFYxxx` ID and are documented in `docs/diagnostics.md`
- [ ] `README.md` updated if the change affects the quick-start examples

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for details.
